certaintyNote: Standardization fact is dated in text (2024); the standard document is fixed.
sourceRef: NIST FIPS 203, Module-Lattice-Based Key-Encapsulation Mechanism Standard (2024), doi:10.6028/NIST.FIPS.203

en.title: ML-KEM (Module-Lattice Key Encapsulation)
en.shortDefinition: ML-KEM (formerly CRYSTALS-Kyber) is a NIST-standardized post-quantum key encapsulation mechanism based on the Module Learning With Errors (MLWE) problem, designed to resist both classical and quantum attacks.
en.detailedExplanation: ML-KEM is the first post-quantum key encapsulation mechanism standardized by NIST (FIPS 203, 2024). It replaces RSA and elliptic curve key exchange protocols that are vulnerable to Shor's algorithm. ML-KEM's security is based on the hardness of the Module Learning With Errors (MLWE) problem over polynomial lattices. It offers three security levels: ML-KEM-512 (equivalent to AES-128), ML-KEM-768 (AES-192), and ML-KEM-1024 (AES-256). The algorithm is efficient, with small key sizes and fast computation compared to other post-quantum candidates. ML-KEM uses the NTT (Number Theoretic Transform) for efficient polynomial multiplication and includes an implicit rejection mechanism for CCA security.
analogies: ML-KEM is like building a lock from a mathematical maze (lattice) that is easy to navigate with the key but exponentially hard to solve for anyone who doesn't have it, even with a quantum computer.
Think of it as upgrading from a lock that quantum lockpicks can crack (RSA) to a new quantum-resistant lock design based on a completely different mathematical structure.
commonMisconceptions: ML-KEM does NOT use quantum computing -- it is a CLASSICAL algorithm designed to resist attacks from quantum computers.
ML-KEM does NOT encrypt data directly -- it is a key encapsulation mechanism that establishes shared secret keys, which are then used with symmetric encryption.
keyTakeaways: Based on the Module Learning With Errors (MLWE) lattice problem.
Replaces RSA/ECDH key exchange to protect against Shor's algorithm.

practiceQuestions.questionText: What mathematical problem is ML-KEM's security based on?
practiceQuestions.explanation: ML-KEM's security relies on the hardness of the Module Learning With Errors problem over polynomial lattices, which is believed to be hard for both classical and quantum computers.

ko.title: ML-KEM (모듈 격자 키 캡슐화)
ko.shortDefinition: ML-KEM(이전 CRYSTALS-Kyber)은 모듈 오류 학습(MLWE) 문제에 기반한 NIST 표준 후양자 키 캡슐화 메커니즘으로, 고전적 및 양자 공격 모두에 저항하도록 설계되었습니다.
ko.detailedExplanation: ML-KEM은 NIST가 표준화한 최초의 후양자 키 캡슐화 메커니즘입니다(FIPS 203, 2024). 쇼어 알고리즘에 취약한 RSA와 타원 곡선 키 교환 프로토콜을 대체합니다. 보안은 다항식 격자 위의 MLWE 문제의 어려움에 기반합니다. 세 가지 보안 수준: ML-KEM-512, ML-KEM-768, ML-KEM-1024를 제공합니다.
analogies: ML-KEM은 열쇠가 있으면 쉽게 탐색할 수 있지만 양자 컴퓨터도 풀기 어려운 수학적 미로(격자)로 자물쇠를 만드는 것과 같습니다.
양자 열쇠따개가 열 수 있는 자물쇠(RSA)에서 완전히 다른 수학 구조에 기반한 양자 저항 자물쇠로 업그레이드하는 것으로 생각하세요.
commonMisconceptions: ML-KEM은 양자 컴퓨팅을 사용하지 않습니다 -- 양자 컴퓨터 공격에 저항하도록 설계된 고전적 알고리즘입니다.
ML-KEM은 데이터를 직접 암호화하지 않습니다 -- 공유 비밀 키를 수립하는 키 캡슐화 메커니즘입니다.
keyTakeaways: NIST 표준(FIPS 203) 후양자 키 캡슐화 메커니즘.
모듈 오류 학습(MLWE) 격자 문제 기반.
쇼어 알고리즘으로부터 보호하기 위해 RSA/ECDH 키 교환 대체.

practiceQuestions.questionText: ML-KEM의 보안은 어떤 수학적 문제에 기반합니까?
practiceQuestions.explanation: ML-KEM의 보안은 다항식 격자 위의 MLWE 문제의 어려움에 기반합니다.

ja.title: ML-KEM（モジュール格子鍵カプセル化）
ja.shortDefinition: ML-KEM（旧CRYSTALS-Kyber）はMLWE問題に基づくNIST標準ポスト量子鍵カプセル化メカニズムです。
ja.detailedExplanation: NIST初の標準化ポスト量子KEM（FIPS 203, 2024）。RSAとECDHに代わり、ショアのアルゴリズムへの耐性を提供。多項式格子上のMLWE問題の困難さに基づきます。
analogies: 量子コンピュータでも解けない数学的迷路。
RSAから量子耐性設計へのアップグレード。
commonMisconceptions: ML-KEMは量子コンピューティングを使いません。
ML-KEMは直接暗号化しません。

practiceQuestions.questionText: ML-KEMのセキュリティの基盤は？

zh-Hans.title: ML-KEM（模块格密钥封装）
zh-Hans.shortDefinition: ML-KEM（原CRYSTALS-Kyber）是基于MLWE问题的NIST标准后量子密钥封装机制。
zh-Hans.detailedExplanation: NIST首个标准化后量子KEM（FIPS 203, 2024）。替代RSA和ECDH，抵抗Shor算法。基于多项式格上MLWE问题的困难性。
analogies: 像用量子计算机也解不开的数学迷宫制锁。
从RSA升级到量子抗性设计。

de.title: ML-KEM (Modul-Gitter-Schlüsselkapselung)
de.shortDefinition: ML-KEM ist ein NIST-standardisierter Post-Quanten-Schlüsselkapselungsmechanismus basierend auf dem MLWE-Problem.
de.detailedExplanation: Erstes von NIST standardisiertes Post-Quanten-KEM (FIPS 203, 2024). Ersetzt RSA/ECDH. Basiert auf der Härte des MLWE-Problems.
analogies: Wie ein mathematisches Labyrinth das auch Quantencomputer nicht lösen können.
Upgrade von RSA zu quantenresistentem Design.

practiceQuestions.questionText: Worauf basiert die Sicherheit von ML-KEM?

fr.title: ML-KEM (Encapsulation de clé par réseau modulaire)
fr.shortDefinition: ML-KEM est un mécanisme d'encapsulation de clé post-quantique standardisé par le NIST basé sur le problème MLWE.
fr.detailedExplanation: Premier KEM post-quantique standardisé par le NIST (FIPS 203, 2024). Remplace RSA/ECDH. Basé sur la difficulté du problème MLWE.
analogies: Comme un labyrinthe mathématique insoluble même par ordinateur quantique.
Mise à niveau de RSA vers un design résistant au quantique.
commonMisconceptions: ML-KEM n'utilise PAS le calcul quantique.

practiceQuestions.questionText: Sur quel problème repose la sécurité de ML-KEM?

es.title: ML-KEM (Encapsulación de clave por retículo modular)
es.shortDefinition: ML-KEM es un mecanismo de encapsulación de clave post-cuántico estandarizado por NIST basado en el problema MLWE.
es.detailedExplanation: Primer KEM post-cuántico estandarizado por NIST (FIPS 203, 2024). Reemplaza RSA/ECDH. Basado en la dificultad del problema MLWE.
analogies: Como un laberinto matemático irresoluble incluso por computadora cuántica.
Actualización de RSA a diseño resistente al cuántico.

practiceQuestions.questionText: ¿En qué problema se basa la seguridad de ML-KEM?

plainTextDescription.en: LWE problem: find secret s given public matrix A, noisy product b, and modulus q
plainTextDescription.ko: LWE 문제: 공개 행렬 A, 잡음이 있는 곱 b, 모듈러스 q가 주어졌을 때 비밀 s 찾기

citationReferences: NIST. (2024). FIPS 203: Module-Lattice-Based Key-Encapsulation Mechanism Standard.
Avanzi, R., et al. (2024). CRYSTALS-Kyber: Algorithm Specification and Supporting Documentation.
